blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,296 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 17.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 61".
